headline: Clorox (CLX) Down 0.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Clorox (CLX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index Adds Eleven Securities Following March Reconstitution
summary: Bloomberg Indices announced the following changes to the Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index effective prior to the open of trading on Thursday, March 12, 2026, to coincide with the March reconstitution of the index. The B500 contains the 500 most highly capitalized US companies weighted by float market cap, reflecting a market capitalization of $58.19 trillion.

headline: Clorox’s GOJO Deal Tests Debt Tolerance And Valuation Upside
summary: Clorox (NYSE:CLX) announced an all cash deal to acquire GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell, in a transaction largely financed with debt. The company disclosed that the purchase will add significant leverage to its balance sheet at a time of elevated interest rates. Investors are weighing the benefits of adding a major hygiene brand against concerns about higher borrowing costs and future flexibility. Clorox is best known for its cleaning, household and disinfecting products, and the GOJO...
